Information
Research Use Only

All compounds sold by Barbell Biotech are intended strictly for laboratory and in-vitro research purposes. Products are not approved for human or veterinary use, diagnosis, or treatment. By purchasing, you confirm products will be used solely for legitimate research in accordance with all applicable laws and regulations.

COA & Testing

Every batch is independently tested via HPLC analysis to verify purity and composition. Certificates of Analysis are available upon request for any compound. Use the Request COA button on any product, or email us with your order reference and the compound name.

Payment — Cryptocurrency

All transactions are completed via cryptocurrency transfer. Accepted currencies: USDT (ERC-20), Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), and Solana (SOL). Payment instructions and wallet address are provided at checkout. Orders are dispatched once payment is confirmed on-chain.

Shipping

Standard shipping is free on orders over $150 AUD. Express shipping ($18) is available at checkout. All orders are shipped in plain, discreet packaging with tracking. Domestic Australian orders: 2–5 business days standard, 1–2 days express.

Storage

Lyophilised peptide compounds should be stored at −20°C for long-term stability, or at 4°C once reconstituted for short-term use. BAC water should be stored at room temperature, away from direct light. Full storage recommendations are included with every order.

Contact

For COA requests, order enquiries, or any other questions, contact us at research@barbellbiotech.com. We aim to respond within 24 hours on business days (AEST).

Terms & Conditions
1. Research Use Only

All products sold by Barbell Biotech are intended strictly for laboratory, in-vitro, and scientific research purposes only. Products are not for human consumption, veterinary use, clinical application, diagnosis, or treatment. By completing a purchase, you confirm you are a qualified researcher, products will be used exclusively for legitimate research, you will comply with all applicable laws, and you are 18 years of age or older.

2. Orders & Payment

All prices are in Australian Dollars (AUD). Payment is accepted exclusively via cryptocurrency transfer. An order is not confirmed until payment is verified on-chain. Barbell Biotech reserves the right to cancel any order at its discretion. Cryptocurrency transactions are irreversible; exercise care when initiating transfers.

3. Shipping & Delivery

Standard shipping is free on orders over $150 AUD. Express shipping is available at checkout. Estimated delivery times are not guaranteed. Risk of loss passes to the customer upon dispatch. Barbell Biotech is not responsible for delays caused by carriers or incorrect addresses.

4. Refunds & Returns

Due to the nature of research compounds, all sales are final. Refunds or replacements will only be considered where a product is demonstrably defective, raised within 7 days of delivery by contacting research@barbellbiotech.com.

5. Subscription (Loyalty) Program

Subscribers receive a 10% discount on all orders while the subscription is active. Subscriptions may be cancelled at any time by emailing research@barbellbiotech.com. Barbell Biotech reserves the right to modify or discontinue the loyalty program at any time.

6. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Barbell Biotech excludes all liability for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential loss or damage arising from use of our products or website. Nothing in these terms limits liability that cannot be excluded under Australian Consumer Law.

7. Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of Queensland, Australia. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Queensland. Contact: research@barbellbiotech.com
